title: Out of Africa
description: 315,000 years of how Homo sapiens spread across the planet, as a self-playing scrubbable globe. 81 milestones from the earliest fossils to the last Polynesian voyages.
license_notes: Land polygons: Natural Earth (Public Domain, world-atlas/land-110m via jsdelivr CDN). Images: 74 hand-picked Wikimedia Commons files — mix of CC BY 2.0/2.5/3.0/4.0, CC BY-SA 2.0/3.0/4.0, CC0 and Public Domain. Each panel links to the Commons file page for license + author. Videos: 41 events embedded as YouTube thumbnails-with-play (click opens youtube.com in a new tab); thumbnails served from img.youtube.com under YouTube's preview-image fair use. Source channels: PBS Eons, NOVA, Stefan Milo, SciShow, TED-Ed. References: papers cite real DOIs where verified; the 3 paper / 4 critique / 42 video slots without verified citations render with a visible TODO badge in the panel. Fonts: EB Garamond (variable) and IBM Plex Mono — both SIL Open Font License 1.1, self-hosted as woff2 in fonts/ (no Google Fonts request at runtime). Code deps: D3 v7 (BSD-3), TopoJSON-client v3 (BSD-3) loaded from cdn.jsdelivr.net.
